basic_details.job_title: BARC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Radiologist, Anaesthetist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) Medical Specialists Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of BARC. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the BARC Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 25 and 70 years who have MBBS, MD/DNB/DM/MS/DA in relevant specialty are eligible to apply for these Medical Specialists vacancies. The walk-in interview process for BARC Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 03 June 2026 and 04 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview thro

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 70 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: General Physician: M.D./DNB in General Medicine, Speciality with a minimum 1 to 4 years of experience after M.D/DNB. Ophthalmologist: MS/MD/DNB (Ophthalmology) from an institute recognised by MCI. Minimum 1 to 4 years of experience. Neonatologist: DM/DNB (Neonatologist) with 4 to 10 years of experience. Radiologist: M.D. /DNB or equivalent in radio-diagnosis from a recognized University with minimum 1 to 4 years of experience. Anaesthetist: MD/DNB Anaesthesia with 1 year Experience or DA Anesthesia with 2 year Experience. Neurologist: DM/DNB (Neurology) with 10 to 16 years of experience. Dermatologist: MD/DNB in Dermatology from Institute recognized by MCI 1 to 4 years of experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 88400 approx. - Rs. 154000 approx. Per Month
salary_details.details: General Physician: Rs. 22,984/- Ophthalmologist: Rs. 91,936/- Neonatologist:Rs. 13,793/- Radiologist: Rs. 91,936/ Anaesthetist: Rs. 45,968/- Neurologist: Rs.40,040/- Dermatologist: Rs.34,476/-
